title: Almost Unify Everything
description: An addon for Almost Unified/Forge that adds inventory and loot table unification.
body:
A simple addon for [Almost Unified](https://modrinth.com/mod/almost-unified) which applies its unification to block drops.
This mod also adds the following commands:

- **/unifyeverything unify**
- **/unifyeverything unify playersin <dimension>**
- **/unifyeverything unify all <rangeInChunks>**
